ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "director" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "genre" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "studio" INTEGER /* ID of the studio */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Total cost incurred in producing the movie */,
  "marketing_cost" REAL /* Cost of marketing and promotion */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Gross earnings in the domestic market */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* Gross earnings in the international market */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross earnings (domestic + international) */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin as a percentage */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards or nominations the movie has received */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the movie trailer */,
  "trailer_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the movie trailer */,
  "trailer_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the movie trailer */,
  "trailer_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio FOREIGN KEY ("studio") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director FOREIGN KEY ("director") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the studio */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the studio's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the studio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* A score indicating the popularity of the genre */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of movies in this genre */,
  "total_movies" INTEGER /* Total number of movies in this genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Director's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards or nominations the director has received */,
  "average_movie_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the director's movies */,
  "total_movies_directed" INTEGER /* Total number of movies directed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "adjusted_gross" REAL /* Adjusted gross earnings */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross earnings */,
  "overseas" REAL /* Overseas earnings */,
  "overseas_percent" REAL /* Percentage of overseas earnings */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made */,
  "profit_percent" REAL /* Percentage of profit */,
  "opening_weekend_gross" REAL /* Gross earnings during the opening weekend */,
  "opening_weekend_theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters during the opening weekend */,
  "total_theaters" INTEGER /* Total number of theaters the movie was shown in */,
  "domestic_percent" REAL /* Percentage of domestic earnings */,
  "international_percent" REAL /* Percentage of international earnings */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the movie trailer */,
  "trailer_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the movie trailer */,
  "trailer_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the movie trailer */,
  "trailer_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imdb_ratings" (
  "imdb_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IMDb rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* IMDb rating */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes */,
  "top_1000_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes from IMDb's top 1000 users */,
  "metascore" INTEGER /* Metascore from Metacritic */,
  "user_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews */,
  "critic_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of critic reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imdb_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movielens_ratings" (
  "movielens_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MovieLens rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* MovieLens rating */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes */,
  "top_1000_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes from MovieLens's top 1000 users */,
  "user_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews */,
  "critic_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of critic reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movielens_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movielens_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runtime" (
  "runtime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runtime entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runtime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtime_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, producer, executive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gross_us" (
  "gross_us_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gross US entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "gross_us" REAL /* Gross earnings in the US */,
  "gross_percent_us" REAL /* Percentage of gross earnings in the US */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gross_us_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gross_us_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the movie was released */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the movie was released */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification (e.g., PG, R) for the release */,
  "theater_count" INTEGER /* Number of theaters in which the movie was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
